metadata.title: China Solar Tracker Slewing Drive Supplier Shortlist
metadata.description: Chinese manufacturers of SDE9-style worm-drive slewing drives for dual-axis solar tracking systems. Reference benchmark is Jimmy Technology (Huizhou) Co., Ltd. — OMITTED from outbound list as that is the product being benchmarked.

search_criteria.target_product: SDE9 Slewing Drive, Bore 9", OD 12" (30.48 cm), Worm Drive, Dual Axis Solar Tracker
search_criteria.reference_brand: Jimmy Technology (Huizhou) Co., Ltd. — NOT CONTACTED
priority_features: 9" bore / 12" OD (or comparable SDE series sizes)

email_verification_notes.action_required: Review inferred emails before dispatch; verify bounce-back behavior on first send.

companies.name_en: Luoyang Hengguan Bearing Technology Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 洛阳恒冠轴承技术有限公司
companies.email_notes: Confirmed via company website contact page.
companies.notes: Established slewing drive and slewing bearing manufacturer. Produces SDE series and SE series drives. Luoyang is the slewing bearing capital of China.

companies.name_en: Xuzhou Wanda Slewing Bearing Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 徐州万达回转支承有限公司
companies.email_notes: Confirmed via Alibaba and company website.
companies.notes: Well-known slewing bearing and slewing drive manufacturer. Supplies solar tracker OEMs globally. Active Alibaba Gold Supplier.

companies.name_cn: 杭州中芝机械有限公司
companies.email_notes: Confirmed via company website and Made-in-China profile.
companies.notes: Manufactures slewing drives and precision gear reducers. Has dedicated solar tracker product line. Strong export track record.

companies.name_en: Suzhou Haydon Drive Technology Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 苏州海盾传动技术有限公司
companies.notes: Specialises in worm-drive slewing drives for solar trackers and industrial robots. ISO 9001 certified. Offers OEM/ODM.

companies.name_cn: 深圳市拓普乐科技有限公司
companies.email_notes: Confirmed via company website contact page.
companies.notes: Slewing drive manufacturer targeting solar tracker OEMs in Southeast Asia. Shorter lead times due to Shenzhen location. Strong English communication.

companies.name_en: Yantai Hengfengtai Reducer Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 烟台恒丰泰减速机制造有限公司
companies.email_notes: Domain confirmed; generic alias inferred from pattern. Verify on first send.
companies.notes: Worm gear reducer and slewing drive specialist. Long-standing supplier to solar tracker integrators in China and export markets.

companies.name_cn: 洛阳龙威轴承有限公司
companies.email_notes: Domain confirmed; generic alias inferred. Verify on first send.
companies.notes: Luoyang-based slewing bearing and drive manufacturer. Produces full SDE range. Competitive pricing due to Luoyang industrial cluster.
